title: rubus fusus
intro: Rubus fusus, also known as the fused dewberry, is a species of shrub in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of Rubus fusus include its high content of anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and other polyphenolic compounds, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus fusus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Rubus fusus is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used topically as a salve or cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
